programme.desc: Mike returns home after a two-month road trip; a tornado heads toward Outdoor Man and the Baxter family home.

programme.desc: Vanessa thinks Eve should be more supportive of having a woman president; Mike and Mandy wonder what they have in common.

programme.desc: Jim and Cheryl adjust the clocks to get the kids to bed earlier so they can have more quality time together.

programme.desc: When Cheryl's respectable bachelorette party disappoints Dana, Jim and Andy treat Dana to a rowdy night she will never forget.

programme.title: Home Improvement

programme.desc: Mike begrudgingly invites Ryan to his weekly poker game but immediately regrets it when Ryan gets the guys to open up about their feelings.
